sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
வினைச்சொல் - விரும்பு, நேசி, முத்தஞ்செய், அன்பாயிரு, சிநேகி, அன்புகூர்
1. to love; to be friendly to one
3. to be kindly disposed to one, wish one well

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5384; to be a friend to (fond of [an individual or an object]), that is, have affection for (denoting personal attachment, as a matter of sentiment or feeling; while G25 is wider, embracing especially the judgment and the deliberate assent of the will as a matter of principle, duty and propriety: the two thus stand related very much as G2309 and G1014, or as G2372 and G3563 respectively; the former being chiefly of the heart and the latter of the head); specifically to kiss (as a mark of tenderness): - kiss, love.
